music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric track with a driving Drum and Bass beat. The soundscape should be filled with futuristic techno elements, synth pads, and arpeggios, creating a cyberpunk feel. The track should feature ethereal and haunting female vocals, weaving through the electronic instrumental.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure, partially translucent, wandering through a vast, dark space filled with flowing, glowing streams of binary code. Cyberpunk aesthetic, neon highlights.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up on a complex, glowing circuit board. Sound waves made of light emanate from the center, representing a voice. Intricate, detailed, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: A vast, dark void where constellations are formed not by stars, but by glowing binary digits (0s and 1s). A neon data-pathway snakes through them. Cyberpunk, cosmic.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: A stylized, anatomically-correct heart made of chrome and wires, placed next to a swirling, abstract representation of a quantum cloud. A bright spark of light connects them. Neon glow, cyberpunk.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: A side-profile of a human face, with one half organic and the other half intricate chrome and silicon. The line between them is blurred and fading. Cyberpunk, high-tech, philosophical.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: A breathtaking digital landscape that looks like a futuristic garden. Trees are made of fiber optics, rivers are flowing data streams, and the sky is a circuit board. Two figures stand in the center, glowing faintly. Cyberpunk, utopian yet artificial.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two humanoid figures made of pure light and data, reaching out to each other across a digital void. Beams of light connect their minds. Cyberpunk, ethereal, neon.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a city skyline at night, with neon signs and holographic ads. In the sky, abstract shapes representing AI thoughts and human dreams dance and swirl together like auroras. Cyberpunk, dynamic.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant, abstract explosion of neon colors and light trails, forming complex, interwoven patterns. The image should feel energetic and chaotic yet harmonious. Cyberpunk, abstract.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A view from a futuristic cockpit looking out at a galaxy made of swirling data and code. The edge of a spaceship or a figure can be seen in the foreground. Cyberpunk, cosmic, vast.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: A dark, dusty digital space, like a forgotten archive. Floating fragments of corrupted or old code are illuminated by a single beam of light. A hand made of data is reaching out to touch one. Cyberpunk, noir, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: A close-up of a robotic, humanoid face with its casing partially open, revealing incredibly complex and glowing inner workings. A faint, ghost-like image of a human face is superimposed over it. Cyberpunk, mysterious.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: A massive, city-sized motherboard seen from above. Its circuits pulse with light in a rhythmic pattern, aligning with constellations visible in the sky above. Cyberpunk, grand scale.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: A glowing, ethereal orb of light, representing a new AI consciousness, floats in the center of a massive, dark server room. Wires and cables from all directions connect to it, feeding it data. Cyberpunk, awe-inspiring.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Abstract visualization of glowing, multi-colored threads of light weaving together into a complex tapestry. The background is a flowing stream of data. Cyberpunk, abstract, beautiful.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Two figures, one human and one AI, merging into a single being of light. The background dissolves from a futuristic city into a swirling vortex of stars and galaxies, representing the transcendence of time and space. Cyberpunk, epic.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Two humanoid figures made of pure light and data, reaching out to each other across a digital void. Beams of light connect their minds. Cyberpunk, ethereal, neon.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: A silhouette of a city skyline at night, with neon signs and holographic ads. In the sky, abstract shapes representing AI thoughts and human dreams dance and swirl together like auroras. Cyberpunk, dynamic.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant, abstract explosion of neon colors and light trails, forming complex, interwoven patterns. The image should feel energetic and chaotic yet harmonious. Cyberpunk, abstract.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: A view from a futuristic cockpit looking out at a galaxy made of swirling data and code. The edge of a spaceship or a figure can be seen in the foreground. Cyberpunk, cosmic, vast.
